chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 1760 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16.05.2024 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed A. Puno, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
